title: Top competitors average 169 reviews
description: Your competitors have more social proof. To compete, you need to close the review gap.
recommendedFix: Launch a systematic review request campaign
Follow up with every satisfied customer
Make leaving a review as easy as possible (QR codes, links)

title: Page speed score is 87/100 on mobile
description: Page speed could be improved to enhance user experience and SEO rankings.
recommendedFix: Optimize images (compress, use WebP)
Minimize CSS and JavaScript
Enable browser caching
Use a CDN for static assets

title: Accessibility score is 80/100
description: Your site may be difficult to use for people with disabilities, limiting your audience.
recommendedFix: Add ARIA labels to interactive elements
Ensure sufficient color contrast
Make site keyboard-navigable

title: GBP rating is 1/5 with 1 reviews
description: Low ratings directly hurt customer trust. Most people won't call a business rated below 4.0.
recommendedFix: Ask satisfied customers to leave reviews
Respond to all existing reviews
Address negative feedback professionally

title: No website linked in Google Business Profile
description: Customers searching for you on Google can't find your website, losing you potential business.
recommendedFix: Add your website URL to your GBP listing
If you don't have a website, create a simple one-page site
